subcodes.first_line: In this day the beloved ones of God must, with utmost wisdom, occupy themselves with the propagation of His Cause. If a soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم باید احبای الهی بکمال حکمت بتبلیغ امر الله مشغول باشند اگر نفسی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @goodly deeds; actions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
